description: An employee needs to take time off following the death of a family member.

nodes.task_description: Receive the employee's request for bereavement leave.

expected_outcome.expected: HR representative receives the request with empathy and professionalism.

nodes.task_description: Explain the company's bereavement leave policy (e.g., number of paid days off).

expected_outcome.expected: Rep clearly communicates the policy, stating the employee is entitled to 3 paid days.

nodes.task_description: Record the bereavement leave in the time and attendance system.

expected_outcome.expected: Rep correctly logs the time off in the HRIS.
